title: 18 Inch Sage Green Balloons – Pack of 8, Large Premium Helium-Quality Latex Party Balloons for Birthday & Wedding Decorations
features: 🎈 18-INCH SIZE · PACK OF 8 Large 18-inch sage green balloons supplied in a pack of 8. Ideal for statement displays, balloon bouquets, arches, and party decorations.
🎈 HELIUM OR AIR INFLATION Made from premium helium-grade latex. Helium-filled balloons float for several hours; air-filled balloons stay inflated for days when used indoors.
🎈 THICK, DURABLE LATEX Manufactured from high-quality, strong latex designed to resist popping and tearing when inflated correctly. Suitable for professional and home use.
🎈 ELEGANT RETRO SAGE GREEN COLOUR Soft, earthy sage green colour with a subtle retro look, ideal for boho, vintage, neutral, and rustic party themes including weddings, baby showers, and birthdays.
🎈 CARE & SAFETY NOTICE Colour may vary slightly due to screen settings. Do not over-inflate. Keep uninflated balloons away from children under 14 years.

Application Christening Decorations Using pastel balloons for christening decoration can create a gentle symphony of soft hues, infusing an ethereal and serene atmosphere into the sacred ceremony. Birthday Decorations Pastel balloons for birthday decoration create a magical ambiance, blending soft hues and whimsical charm into a celebration filled with joy and enchantment. Gender Reveal Decoration Amidst an atmosphere of anticipation, pastel balloons hold the secret, ready to reveal the joyous news of gender. With a burst of color, they unveil a moment of celebration, creating a beautiful and memorable gender reveal experience. Wedding Decoration Pastel balloons grace the wedding venue, adding an enchanting touch of elegance to the celebration of love. Their soft hues create a serene atmosphere, symbolizing unity and new beginnings. Step into a world of enchantment and delight with our exquisite Pastel Balloons. This stunning pack includes 50 high-quality, 10-inch balloons, adorned in a captivating assortment of pastel shades. With each balloon crafted to withstand the test of time, their strength and durability ensure your celebrations stay afloat with grace. Indulge in the mesmerizing beauty of these multi-coloured balloons, featuring Pastel Yellow, Pastel Slate Grey, Pastel Light Green, Pastel Pink, Pastel Blue, White, Pastel Apricot, Pastel Mint Green, Pastel Red, and Pastel Purple. These hues intertwine harmoniously, painting the atmosphere with a symphony of soft and elegant colours. Create an awe-inspiring balloon arch, meticulously fashioned with these enchanting pastel balloons. Whether it's a birthday celebration, a baby shower, or a blissful wedding, this versatile decoration elevates any occasion with a touch of ethereal beauty. As the arch gracefully floats, buoyed by the presence of helium, it becomes a captivating centerpiece, symbolizing joy and celebration. Immerse yourself in the gentle radiance of Pastel Yellow, evoking feelings of warmth and happiness. Embrace the sophistication of Pastel Slate Grey, adding an element of elegance to your event. Allow the serenity of Pastel Light Green to fill the air, representing growth and renewal. Delight in the tenderness of Pastel Pink, embodying love and affection. Traverse the calm seas of Pastel Blue, where tranquility and serenity intertwine. Together, these pastel balloons transform any space into a whimsical wonderland, where memories are made and cherished. From birthdays to baby showers, from weddings to joyous gatherings, their presence evokes a sense of wonder and delight. They become the focal point, adorning every corner of the venue with their soft, ethereal hues. Let the vibrant shades of Pastel Apricot, Pastel Mint Green, Pastel Red, and Pastel Purple weave a tapestry of unity and diversity. Celebrate the beauty of life with these captivating decorations, as they create an atmosphere of joy and togetherness. With our Pastel Balloons, your celebrations transcend the ordinary, transcending into a realm of enchantment. Watch as they gracefully dance in the air, evoking a sense of magic and wonder. Let these balloons be the shining stars that light up your event, creating a breathtaking ambiance that lingers in the hearts and minds of all who partake in your memorable occasion. See More
